text: 492 > R B <& - - o e ecre ATt ez G G e zer bR edzes Ztss. 2 G2 AT N et e o o8 WAl AR o3 052 65 S5 e ol Gl () ayisd 2H RS 12 Believers, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet and when speaking to him do not speak aloud as you speak aloud to one another, ' lest all your deeds are reduced to nothing without your even realising it.”
